response.original_title: Stephen Bargatze: Out in a Minute
response.overview: Out in a Minute is a heartfelt and hilariously unpredictable magic special from Stephen Bargatze, blending old-school illusions, quick-witted crowd work, and deeply personal stories from a lifetime in show business. From classic tricks he performed during his Opryland days to one final stunt his family wishes he’d retire, Stephen turns the evening into a celebration of comedy, magic, and the wonderfully strange journey that helped shape the Bargatze family. As Stephen repeatedly promises throughout the night, he’ll be “out in a minute” — but audiences may wish he’d stay a little longer.
response.title: Stephen Bargatze: Out in a Minute
